reason: No confirmed direct breach of Meta. Mercor (third-party AI contractor) was breached in March 2026, but Meta itself was not. Instagram 17.5M scare denied by Meta. GraphQL vuln patched without exploitation evidence.

Salesforce itself was not breached. Per user guidance (Snowflake analogy): customer breaches via Salesloft Drift/ShinyHunters/Gainsight were attacks on Salesforce CUSTOMERS via misconfigurations and social engineering, not Salesforce's core systems.
No direct breach. Pwn request bug in public Stripe sample repo (April 2026), API abused for skimming on third-party sites, Substack breach exposed Stripe IDs, but Stripe's own systems not breached.
Snowflake itself not breached. April 2026 Anodot supply-chain attack reached customer Snowflake instances via third-party integrator tokens, not via a Snowflake platform breach.
Alleged TeamPCP compromise (March 2026) investigated by Databricks; they reported finding no evidence of compromise. Claim remains unverified.
No confirmed Canva (design platform) breach since May 2025. Major 2026 'Canvas' incident is Instructure Canvas LMS, a different company.
CVE-2025-53967 affected a third-party 'figma-developer-mcp' (Framelink) npm package, not Figma's core platform. No breach of Figma's own systems reported.
Notion AI prompt injection vulnerabilities (Sep 2025, Jan 2026) were vulnerabilities, not confirmed data breaches. UpGuard noted infostealer on associated systems (potential, not confirmed).
No breach of Wiz reported. Wiz is the researcher discovering breaches at other companies (GitHub, etc.).
Scale AI data leak publicly reported around mid-2025 involving sensitive annotation environment data exposed via misconfigured docs; widely cited as a significant AI industry security lapse.
No confirmed Anduril breach reported in any public source during 2025-2026.

Multiple incidents: (1) March 31, 2026 - Anthropic accidentally published full Claude Code source code (~513K lines, 1906 files) via a source map in npm package, downloaded and mirrored publicly. (2) April 7, 2026 - unauthorized access to Claude Mythos Preview via a third-party vendor environment.
records: Claude Code source code leak; Mythos preview accessed

reason: No direct Cohere breach. Only tangentially mentioned in LLMjacking attacks abusing Cohere's models hosted on a compromised customer's AWS Bedrock account.

May 11-12, 2026 Mini Shai-Hulud supply chain attack. Malicious versions of official Mistral AI SDK packages (@mistralai/mistralai on npm and mistralai==2.4.6 on PyPI) published. Mistral confirmed an affected developer device was involved. CVE-2026-45321.
No Ramp breach found in public reporting during 2025-2026.
UpGuard reports no recent security news. No publicly disclosed Brex breach in 2025-2026.

March 2025 insider data theft case: a Rippling employee in Dublin allegedly acted as corporate spy for Deel, exfiltrating internal Slack messages, Salesforce/Google Drive data, customer info, pricing, sales pipelines, and employee data over ~4 months. Documented in court filings.
records: Thousands of internal records; customer data, employee data, trade secrets

reason: No direct breach of Deel. Deel is the alleged perpetrator (not victim) in the Rippling espionage case.
No major publicly disclosed Airtable breach in 2025-2026. UpGuard notes potential infostealer detection but no confirmed breach.
No direct Datadog platform breach. March 2026 npm axios upstream supply-chain affected some Datadog OSS packages briefly; published releases not affected. CVE-2026-31431 had no impact.
Nov 2025 insider shared dashboard screenshots externally; CrowdStrike confirmed systems were not breached and no customer data was compromised. Insider terminated.

August 2025 Salesloft Drift supply chain attack. UNC6395 stole OAuth tokens and exfiltrated data from Palo Alto Networks' Salesforce instance, including business contact info, sales account and basic case data. Disclosed September 2025.
records: Salesforce CRM data (business contacts, sales accounts, cases)

reason: August 2025 Salesloft Drift compromise. UNC6395 accessed Zscaler's Salesforce instance via stolen Drift OAuth tokens, exfiltrating names, business emails, job titles, phone numbers, regional details, product licensing info, and plaintext support case content for a large number of customers. Disclosed Aug 30, 2025.
records: Large number of customer support records, contact and licensing data

reason: Per user guidance: Okta itself not breached in 2025-2026. Jan 2026 ShinyHunters vishing campaign targeted Okta CUSTOMERS' SSO credentials; Okta says no evidence its internal systems were compromised.
MongoBleed (CVE-2025-14847) was a software vulnerability patched in Dec 2025; MongoDB explicitly stated it was not a breach of MongoDB or Atlas systems.

August 2025 Salesloft Drift supply chain attack. Threat actor GRUB1/UNC6395 accessed Cloudflare's Salesforce tenant Aug 12-17, 2025, exfiltrating support case text (customer contact info and message content). Cloudflare identified/rotated 104 customer API tokens found in case text and notified affected customers.
records: Salesforce support case data; 104 customer tokens rotated

reason: 2025 incidents were operational outages (March, August, October) not security breaches. Phishing campaign in Dec 2025 targeted HubSpot users via spoofed pages, not HubSpot's systems. CVE-2025-59340 was a Jinjava vulnerability.
Multiple alleged 2025 incidents (SendGrid 848K records claim, Steam 89M records claim) - Twilio denied all and said data did not originate from its systems. No confirmed direct breach.
Kim Dotcom Feb 2026 hack claim is unverified and dismissed by Palantir as 'unverified and unfounded'. No credible confirmation by any agency or researcher.

Massive breach disclosed Dec 2025. Unauthorized access began June 24, 2025 via overseas servers; an ex-employee stole an internal signing key. Approx. 33.7 million Korean customers' personal info exposed (names, emails, phone numbers, shipping addresses, order histories). $1.17B compensation plan announced.
No Samsara Inc. (IoT/fleet platform) breach reported. Samsara Luggage breach (Jan 2025) is a different company. Biometric privacy settlement was a privacy lawsuit, not a breach.

Toast Payroll breach June 30-July 17, 2025 exposed PII (SSNs, emails, phone numbers, DOBs, financial account numbers) for Toast Payroll users. Disclosed July/September 2025. Additionally, August 12-15, 2025 Salesloft Drift incident accessed limited Salesforce data.
records: Toast Payroll customers/employees (subset); SSNs and financial data exposed

reason: May 2026 Mini Shai-Hulud supply chain attack. 65 malicious versions of UiPath npm packages were published by TeamPCP threat group, distributing credential-stealing malware (CVE-2026-45321).
records: 65 npm package versions compromised; downstream credential exposure

reason: Only an unverified Oct 2025 dark web claim of a database for sale. No officially confirmed breach. Ongoing data broker privacy litigation is separate.
No publicly reported Celonis breach in 2025-2026.
No publicly confirmed Gong.io breach in 2025-2026.
No publicly confirmed Outreach breach in 2025-2026.
Rankiteo: 0 incidents reported. No public Lattice breach in 2025-2026.
Rankiteo: 0 incidents. 6sense confirmed it was not affected by Vercel/Context.ai or CanisterWorm npm/PyPI incidents.
Nov 2025 16TB unsecured MongoDB exposure was a third party that scraped data from sources including Apollo.io/LinkedIn, not a direct breach of Apollo.io.
No confirmed Demandbase breach. Company has actively confirmed it was not affected by Salesloft/Drift, SharePoint, or RSC/Next.js vulnerabilities.
No publicly confirmed Gusto breach in 2025-2026.
No publicly disclosed Clay.com breach in 2025-2026.
No publicly disclosed Attio breach in 2025-2026.

March 24, 2026 security incident: access control bug in Linear's sync group permission resolver allowed cross-workspace data exposure. Linear published a post-mortem, reverted the change within an hour, force-reloaded clients, audited logs, and notified affected workspaces within 48 hours.
records: Multiple affected workspaces; per-workspace exposure summaries issued

reason: April 19, 2026 disclosure. Attacker compromised Context.ai via Lumma Stealer, used stolen Google Workspace OAuth tokens to access a Vercel employee account, then pivoted into Vercel environments and decrypted non-sensitive env vars. Stolen data (API keys, source code, ~580 employee records) listed for sale on BreachForums for $2M.
records: Internal credentials, source code, ~580 employee records, customer env vars

reason: Supabase core platform itself not breached. 2025 MCP 'lethal trifecta' was a customer-deployment risk pattern; mass misconfig issues are customer RLS misconfigurations, similar to Snowflake-customer pattern.
September 2025 'Neon' app breach was the iPhone call-recording app (different company), not Neon.tech (serverless Postgres). No Neon.tech breach reported.
No direct Procore platform breach in 2025-2026. Reported subcontractor account compromise via Gmail was detected and stopped by Procore's systems.
No publicly disclosed PlanetScale breach in 2025-2026.
